title: 4 Packs 10 Feet Long Foil Fringe Halloween Garland Orange Purple Black Tinsel Metallic Patriotic Streamers Pumpkin Wall Hanging Banner for Car Parade Floats Table Skirts Indoor Party Decorations
features: 【Generous Quantity & Size】4 pieces of Halloween tinsel foil fringe garland, each measuring 10 feet (304.8cm) in length and 15inch (37cm) in width. providing generous coverage to adorn doorways, windows, walls, or even serve as a dazzling backdrop for Halloween parties.

【Versatile Decor Solution】: Perfect for Halloween parties, car parades, float decorations, table skirts, wall hangings, and various indoor party settings, haunted houses, trick-or-treat setups. Ideal for decorating doorways, windows, walls, or as a photo booth backdrop.Elevate your Halloween decor with our 4 pack Halloween tinsel garland!

【Classic Halloween Color Scheme】Featuring iconic black, purple, and orange hues, adorned with cute pumpkin patterns. Instantly adds festive charm and a touch of whimsy to your decor,perfect for adding a playful yet festive touch to any space.

【Easy Installation】 The pre-applied double-sided adhesive ensures hassle-free installation, just peel off the backing and stick to any clean, smooth surface. like doors, windows, walls, or party backdrops.When the festivities end, removal is easy and leaves no sticky residue, protecting your walls and furniture.

【Shiny & Durable Material】Made of high-quality tinsel that shimmers under light, creating a captivating visual effect. Sturdy construction ensures reuse for multiple seasons,making them a cost-effective addition to your holiday decor collection.
description: Product Description Halloween Foil Fringe Curtains - 4 Pack 10 Ft Pumpkin Print Orange Purple Black Tinsel Metallic Streamers 4-Pack 10 Ft Value：Covers doors, walls, and windows – no extra buys needed Pumpkin Magic：Vibrant orange/purple/black stripes + cute pumpkin faces = instant Halloween vibes Metallic Shine：High-density foil reflects light like a disco ball Peel-and-Stick Ease：Strong double-sided tape sticks fast (no tools!) and peels clean Pumpkin Tinsel Metallic Foil Fringe Wall Hanging Banner for Halloween Party Decoration Product Details Cuttable Flexibility ：Trim to size for tables, doors, or trunks. Soft Shiny Finish ：Smooth foil with eye-catching metallic glow. Pre-Taped Ease ：Peel-and-stick in seconds, no tools required. 3m/9.84ft Length ：Covers large areas for full festive impact Your All-In-One Halloween Decor Halloween pumpkin foil fringe garlands suitable for various occasions: Trunk-or-Treat Parades：Turn car trunks into pumpkin-packed wonderlands – kids (and pets!) will beg to pose against the shimmering backdrop Party Table Skirts：Drape around dessert tables to make candy, cookies, and cider look like a haunted gourmet spread Classroom/Office Makeovers：Turn bland walls into a pumpkin paradise for Halloween lessons, team parties, or “creepy cool” vibes. Storefront Showcases：Line shop windows with the glossy stripes – passersby stop, stare, and snap Porch & Entryway Drama：Frame front doors, wrap porch railings, or hang as wall art – guests step into a haunted carnival the second they arrive. DIY Photo Booth Magic：Stick on any wall, add props, and watch everyone “ooh”
